ocr_findings.description: '試験にはコレが出る！' callout: OCR renders 'コレ' as 'つし' — kana shape confusion producing meaningless string
DNS concept diagram contains numbered step labels (①〜⑥) and directional annotations inside the figure; these are not extracted into OCR text, only a placeholder image reference appears

reviewer_notes: Page is regular DNS learning content with diagram, body text, and learning-point callout. Main body text is faithfully reproduced. The 'コレ→つし' wrong_char in the exam callout box is a recurring OCR artifact on this page style. Diagram interior text loss is acceptable as image placeholder.
